title: France 2002: Vendeuil, Chaumard, Morvan & Cluny

main_route.excerpt: Two days after arriving back from Thorperness we have left for France. Simon, Eve, John, Charles.

main_route.note: Named in trip title only; diary pages for this trip beyond the boundary page are not transcribed. Vendeuil-Caply (Oise) is a well-known stopover campsite on the Calais-Burgundy route.
Named in trip title only; Chaumard is a village in the Morvan (Nièvre), near Lac de Pannecière — consistent with the trip title pairing of Chaumard and Morvan.
Named in trip title only; Cluny (Saône-et-Loire) is the famous Burgundian abbey town, consistent with a Morvan-area trip.

crossings.excerpt: Two days after arriving back from Thorperness we have left for France.

unresolved.issue: Peter is said to fly to Lyons (Lyon) — it is unclear whether Lyon was a visit/stop for the main party or only Peter's arrival point. The main party presumably drove; no Lyon stop is confirmed in the available diary text.
unresolved.excerpt: Peter will fly to Lyons next

unresolved.issue: Morvan appears in the trip title as a distinct entry alongside Chaumard. It may refer to the Morvan regional park generally (in which case Chaumard IS the Morvan stop) or to a separate location within the Morvan. Cannot distinguish without the missing diary pages.

Only the departure sentence is transcribed; all subsequent stops derive from the trip title_guess only
summary: In late July 2002 Simon, Eve, John, Charles (and Peter joining by air) drove to France for a Burgundy-area camping trip taking in Vendeuil-Caply (likely a transit overnight), the Morvan village of Chaumard, and the abbey town of Cluny. The diary pages covering the trip itself were not available in this bundle; stop details are inferred from the trip title only.
extraction_notes: Only one boundary page (A_0316_L) was supplied, capturing only the departure sentence for this trip. The spread_range [A_0316, A_0316] and mixed_start/mixed_end flags confirm the diary pages proper are outside this bundle. All stops except home and the crossing are sourced from the title_guess alone (confidence capped at 0.6). Vendeuil: interpreted as Vendeuil-Caply (Oise), a well-known campsite stop on the Calais-south route — but could be another Vendeuil; flag for verification when full pages become available. Morvan may be a separate stop or simply the regional description of the Chaumard base. Peter flying to Lyon may indicate the family also visited Lyon, but this cannot be confirmed. Date_end is unknown; date_guess of 2002-07 from the bundle header suggests a July trip.
